name: A-101
key_facts: Number of floors: 8 above grade, 2 below grade

Wall R-value: R-21 minimum continuous insulation
Roof R-value: R-30 minimum above deck

Conference room flooring: Luxury vinyl tile (LVT)
Lobby flooring: Polished concrete with stain
potential_conflicts: RFI-005: Lobby floor finish shown as polished concrete on A-101, but interior finish schedule shows terrazzo
